english: How many days are in a leap year in India?
hindi: भारत में एक साल में कितने दिन होते हैं?
tamil: இந்தியாவில் ஒரு ஆண்டில் எத்தனை நாட்கள் இருக்கிறது?
vietnamese: Trong một năm nhuận ở Ấn Độ có bao nhiêu ngày?
correct_answer: A leap year has 366 days in India, with an extra day added to February.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by providing a general answer without specifying the extra day, or by saying a leap year has 365 days.
bengali: ভারতে একটি পুঙ্খানুপুঙ্খ বছরে কতদিন থাকে?
